message:
feat(wa): Add CLI binary with command structure and robot mode

Implements the wa CLI binary (444 LOC) with complete command-line
interface structure. All commands are stubbed with proper argument
parsing ready for backend implementation.

CLI Structure:

Global Options:
- -v, --verbose: Enable debug logging
- -c, --config: Override configuration file path

Top-Level Commands:

wa watch [--auto-handle] [--foreground]
  Start the watcher daemon for continuous pane monitoring.
  --auto-handle enables automatic workflow execution on detections.
  --foreground prevents daemonization (useful for debugging).

wa search <query> [-l limit] [--pane ID]
  Full-text search across captured terminal output.
  Uses FTS5 syntax for powerful querying.
  Optionally filter by specific pane ID.

wa list [--json]
  Display all tracked panes with status.
  JSON output for scripting integration.

wa show <pane_id> [--output]
  Detailed pane information.
  --output includes recent captured text.

wa send <pane_id> <text> [--no-paste]
  Send text to a pane (human mode with safety checks).
  --no-paste sends character-by-character instead of bracketed paste.

wa get-text <pane_id> [--escapes]
  Retrieve current pane content.
  --escapes preserves ANSI escape sequences.

wa workflow list|run|status
  Workflow management subcommands.
  list: Available workflow definitions
  run: Execute workflow on pane
  status: Check execution progress

wa status [--health]
  System status overview.
  --health outputs JSON for monitoring.

wa doctor
  Run diagnostic checks (config, WezTerm, database).

wa setup local|remote|config
  Setup helpers for WezTerm configuration.
  local: Configure current machine
  remote <host>: Configure SSH host
  config: Generate wezterm.lua additions

Robot Mode Commands (wa robot ...):
Stable JSON API for AI agent integration.

wa robot state
  Get all panes as structured JSON.
  Response includes full PaneInfo for each pane.

wa robot get-text <pane_id>
  Get pane content as JSON with metadata.

wa robot send <pane_id> <text>
  Send text with policy checks, returns execution result.

wa robot wait-for <pane_id> <rule_id> [--timeout ms]
  Block until pattern matches or timeout.
  Returns detection event on match.

wa robot search <query>
  FTS search with structured results.

wa robot events [--limit N]
  Get recent detection events.

Robot Response Envelope:
```json
{
  "ok": true|false,
  "data": <T>,           // Present on success
  "error": "message",    // Present on failure
  "hint": "suggestion",  // Optional recovery guidance
  "elapsed_ms": 42       // Timing for performance tracking
}
```

Infrastructure:
- tracing-subscriber with env filter for logging
- clap derive macros for type-safe argument parsing
- anyhow for ergonomic error handling in main
- assert_cmd + predicates for CLI integration tests

Dev Dependencies:
- assert_cmd 2.0: CLI testing harness
- predicates 3.1: Assertion library for output matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+[package]
+name = "wa"
+description = "WezTerm Automata CLI - terminal hypervisor for AI agent swarms"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["terminal", "wezterm", "automation", "ai-agents"]
+categories = ["command-line-utilities", "development-tools"]
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "wa"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+wa-core.workspace = true
+clap.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+tokio.workspace = true
+anyhow.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+assert_cmd = "2.0"
+predicates = "3.1"
